novel_features.name: On-This-Day Feed
novel_features.description: Get curated historical events, births, deaths, and holidays for any calendar date.

novel_features.name: Agent-Native Unified Flag
novel_features.description: Single --agent flag activates JSON output, compact fields, and deterministic exit codes across every command.

novel_features.name: Disambiguation Exit Code
novel_features.description: Exit code 3 on disambiguation pages so callers know to clarify the query, not just retry.

novel_features.name: Field Selection
novel_features.description: Narrow JSON output to exactly the fields you need across every command.

novel_features.name: Local Summary Cache
novel_features.description: Sync article summaries to a local SQLite store for offline re-queries and custom SQL.

novel_features.name: Featured Article
novel_features.description: Get Wikipedia's featured article for any date — the highest-quality content on the site.
